categories.label: Monetary use
categories.note: Monetary transactions still compete for confirmation against non-monetary data

categories.label: Inscriptions
categories.note: Large witness data consumes blockspace and affects fee pressure

categories.label: Bare multisig
categories.note: UTXO-heavy data creates long-lived validation and storage costs

categories.label: OP_RETURN
categories.note: Small data-carrier outputs still compete for scarce blockspace

categories.label: Other
categories.note: Remainder bucket for non-monetary and unknown transaction categories

categories.label: Direct-to-miner submissions
categories.note: A bypass lane that can avoid ordinary peer relay policy

notes: This is an explanatory map using approximate ranges, not a measured category split
Direct-to-miner submission is represented as a path rather than a percentage
